# Hyphen - Reuse of the code  
## 1 - Goal  
Hyphen (Hyphen Agent, Hyphen Project, HyCore Agent Engine, and Hyphen WebUI) is designed and optimized strictly for local network environments. It is not intended to be deployed as a public-facing service, a globally distributed software, or embedded into third-party applications. We strongly recommend running Hyphen exclusively within a secure, local network; exposing it to the public internet may leave the software or the host system vulnerable to security exploits.  

## 2 - Distribution  
All distribution of this software must strictly adhere to the terms and conditions set forth in the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file. If you choose to distribute software containing Hyphen's code without complying with these license conditions, please be aware that the repository owners disclaim all liability for any consequences, legal or technical, that may arise from such actions.  

## 3 - Fork Actions
### 3.a
While the [LICENSE](LICENSE) defines the legal boundaries of this project, we strongly encourage developers to fork this repository and implement their own improvements. We believe that by branching out, Hyphen can better adapt to diverse user requirements and continuously improve the overall user experience (UX). If you develop a feature or fix that could benefit the community, we invite you to contribute back to the original project.
### 3.b
By branching out, we aim to expand our community and adapt Hyphen to a wider range of use cases. Whether for personal projects, business operations, enterprise-level solutions, or complex automation tasks, we believe that diverse forks will help evolve Hyphen into a more versatile and robust tool that serves everyone’s needs.

## 4 - Variants
Should Hyphen be ported to other programming languages (beyond our primary focus of Python and Dart) or extended to additional platforms (beyond our core support for Linux, Windows, and macOS), we kindly request that you provide clear attribution to the original Hyphen project. Recognizing the source helps maintain the integrity of the project and allows our community to track its evolution across different ecosystems.  

## 5 - Made with
Any content, data, or output generated using Hyphen is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Hyphen project, its developers, or its contributors. Hyphen provides tools for automation and generation; however, the responsibility for verifying, validating, and using the generated output rests solely with the user. We strongly advise users to review and double-check all information produced by Hyphen before publishing or relying upon it for critical tasks.

Hyphen Project is licensed with [GNU General Public License v3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.en.html).
